display_name: UCC sign-in screens — Figma representation + Internal-deferral policy amendment

research.note: Research inherited from parent ucc-passkey-auth. The decision to grant a form-driven exception to control-room components was made in the 2026-05-16 UU3/UU4/UU6 review.

prd.note: PRD inherited from parent ucc-passkey-auth. This enhancement adds Figma representation to already-shipped screens (no new product behavior).

tasks.approval_note: User approved 2026-05-17 with directive to review infra master plan first for data-integrity concerns. Review confirmed UU4 is calibration-window-safe (no infra-glob path touches, no new candidate streams in gate-coverage.jsonl). Two separate items DEFERRED to 2026-05-22 (post v7.9 promotion): Option C MEMORY.md staleness check (C11) + preflight enhancement_parent bug fix (C12).

ux_or_integration.skip_reason: work_type:enhancement (screens already live in production; this work documents existing UI in Figma, no new UX)

rationale_summary: The Internal-deferral policy at fitme-story/docs/CONTRIBUTING-design-system.md §3 says control-room components stay code-first because they are 'heavily data-driven — designing them in Figma without realistic data fixtures produces low-fidelity stubs.' The 2 UCC sign-in pages (/control-room/sign-in + /control-room/sign-in/recover) are form-driven not data-driven: stable email-input + WebAuthn-button UI + 8 known error states, no dynamic data fixtures needed. They also render to UNAUTHENTICATED users (effectively a public-feeling surface). UU1 (coral-pulse polish) already established that form-aesthetic matters here. This enhancement adds a 'form-driven exception' clause to §3 + ships Figma representation for the 2 sign-in screens + AuthPasskeyForm component + Code Connect mappings, closing the loop the parent feature deferred at ship 2026-05-07.

tasks.title: Amend fitme-story/docs/CONTRIBUTING-design-system.md §3 with 'form-driven exception' clause
tasks.note: Adds an explicit exception clause: control-room components MAY have Figma representation when (a) shown to unauthenticated users OR (b) form-driven with no data-fixture complexity. Defines which components qualify (initial list: AuthPasskeyForm, plus the 2 sign-in pages). Defines what stays Internal (TaskTree, AuditLogPanel, DevicesTable, etc.). Cross-references the manifest convention update in T8.

tasks.title: Build Figma frames for /control-room/sign-in (3 states: idle / pending / error)
tasks.note: Three frames using existing Figma tokens (color-brand-indigo, color-brand-coral, neutral ladder, type scale). Uses Figma MCP via /design build skill. Captures the coral-pulse-cta polish from UU1 in the idle state. Error state covers all 8 ERROR_REASON entries from AuthPasskeyForm.tsx ERROR_REASON map. Node IDs land in state.json.figma_node_ids.

tasks.title: Build Figma frames for /control-room/sign-in/recover (3 states: idle / pending / error)
tasks.note: Recover flow uses bootstrap token paste field instead of email input. Idle state shows the input + paste-helper text; pending fires during token verification; error covers bootstrap_invalid + timeout.

tasks.title: Build AuthPasskeyForm component frame in Figma library (5 states: idle / pending / success / error / locked)
tasks.note: Component variants matching the Status type from AuthPasskeyForm.tsx ('idle' | 'pending' | 'success' | 'error' | 'locked'). Light + dark mode pair. Variant property: mode = authenticate | register (controls primary button label). Component becomes the Figma source-of-truth referenced from the 2 page frames in T2/T3.

tasks.title: Author .figma.tsx Code Connect mapping for AuthPasskeyForm
tasks.note: Standard Code Connect mapping per the 19 existing .figma.tsx files (Card, Button, Tag, etc.). Maps Figma variants to React props (mode + status + primaryLabel + disableConditional). Picked up by figma-code-connect-publish.yml on push.

tasks.title: Author .figma.tsx Code Connect mapping for /control-room/sign-in page
tasks.note: Page-level Code Connect mapping. Links the Figma frame from T2 to the React page component.

tasks.title: Author .figma.tsx Code Connect mapping for /control-room/sign-in/recover page
tasks.note: Page-level Code Connect mapping for the recover flow.

tasks.title: Update fitme-story design-system manifest: AuthPasskeyForm + 2 sign-in pages flip Internal → Stable
tasks.note: AuthPasskeyForm entry (currently lines 393-402): status 'Internal' → 'Stable', figmaNodeIds null → populated, hasFigmaConnect false → true, darkModeStatus 'TODO' → 'Designed'. Add 2 new entries for the page-level mappings if the manifest tracks pages. Update the manifest entry count comment at the top of design-system.ts if present.

tasks.title: Update parent ucc-passkey-auth state.json: figma_build_status null → complete + populate figma_node_ids
tasks.note: Currently has figma_build_status: 'deferred_to_prompt' + figma_deferral_reason: 'web_dashboard_no_figma_mapping' + figma_node_ids: {} + figma_portable_prompt: 'docs/prompts/ui/2026-05-07-ucc-passkey-auth-design-build.md'. Flip to figma_build_status: 'completed', populate figma_node_ids from T2/T3/T4, drop figma_deferral_reason.

tasks.title: Verify CI: figma-code-connect-publish.yml runs successfully on the new .figma.tsx files
tasks.note: After push to feature branch: monitor figma-code-connect-publish.yml workflow run. Expect 'success' with the new component IDs listed in the publish output. If FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN secret is missing required scopes (see ios-code-connect T4 diagnosis pattern), abort + escalate before merge.

tasks.title: Append §99 sub-entry to ucc-passkey-auth case study: UU4 closeout
tasks.note: New §99 sub-entry: 'UU4 closeout — form-driven exception added to Internal-deferral policy; 2 sign-in screens + AuthPasskeyForm mapped to Figma with Code Connect.' Tier-tagged T1 (node IDs measured from Figma file). Cross-references the policy amendment + CONTRIBUTING-design-system.md §3.

factors_applied.reason: Figma + Code Connect + manifest in fitme-story; state.json + case study in FT2
9 frames + 1 component (5 variants × 2 themes = 10 component variants)
No new code paths; existing components get Figma representation

transitions.note: 11-task plan approved. Data-integrity review confirmed UU4 is calibration-window-safe; Option C + preflight bug fix deferred to 2026-05-22 (C11/C12 cadence rows) since they touch infra-glob paths.
